## Review and Commit Status

- Implementation commit(s):
- Independent reviewer (different agent/person):

## Checklist

- [ ] Ticket updated (`Status`, acceptance criteria, links).
- [ ] Documentation updated or explicit `No doc changes required` note included.
- [ ] Implementation committed before review.
- [ ] Independent review completed and outcome captured.
- [ ] All post-review changes committed.
- [ ] Improvement opportunities logged in `docs/process-improvement-log.md`.
- [ ] Validation evidence included.
